__rationale__: Triggering fixture for MR-60: yeast two-hybrid marker compatibility. Construct uses an AH109 host (HIS3, ADE2, MEL1, lacZ chromosomal reporters) with a plasmid carrying HIS3 as the selection marker — collision with the HIS3 chromosomal reporter cassette defeats the bait/prey selection logic. Expected eventual outcome (Phase 5/6): HARD block; v0.2 stub returns INFO.

construct.notes: T-414 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage for MR-60. Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations (plasmid markers vs host.expression_features Y2H reporter cassette set).
